findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "review_code" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
detail: Tool "review_code" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

confidence.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
confidence.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: review_code · Private data: review_code · Public sink: review_code.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: review_code · Private data: review_code · Public sink: review_code

confidence.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
